> **A fully functional MS-DOS simulator written entirely in Windows Batch,
> originally crafted as a school project вҖ” and it turned out pretty cool. рҹҳҺ**

## рҹ–ҘпёҸ About

**DvorakMSDOS** simulates the look and feel of an old-school MS-DOS environment,
right inside your Windows command prompt вҖ” no emulator needed.
It boots straight into a login screen, drops you at a retro main menu, and
lets you launch apps, play quiz games, and browse "the web" вҖ” all without
leaving `.bat` files.

---

## рҹҡҖ Getting Started

1. **Clone or download** this repository.
2. **Double-click** `DvorakMSDOS.bat` (or run it from a command prompt).
3. The title bar will show you a helpful hint рҹҳү
4. Log in and enjoy the ride.

> вҡ пёҸ **Requires Windows** with a standard `cmd.exe` environment.

---

## рҹ”җ Login

When the simulator starts, you are greeted by a login screen.
Your credentials are:

| Field    | Value   |
|----------|---------|
| Username | `admin` |
| Password | `1234`  |

> рҹ’Ў **Tip:** The window title gives you a nudge in the right direction when
> you first launch the program.

---

## рҹ“Ң Main Menu

After logging in, you land on the **Main Menu**, which gives you access to
four built-in applications:

```
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘     MAIN  MENU       в•‘
в• в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•Ј
в•‘  [1]  App 1          в•‘
в•‘  [2]  App 2          в•‘
в•‘  [3]  App 3          в•‘
в•‘  [4]  App 4          в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ
```

Each app is a self-contained batch module вҖ” lightweight, fast, and very retro.

---

## рҹҸҒ Start Menu

The **Start Menu** is your gateway to extra goodies:

- рҹ§  **Quiz Games** вҖ” Test your knowledge with a selection of trivia quizzes.
- рҹҢҗ **Browser** вҖ” Surf a curated list of websites (see below).
- рҹҺІ **вҖҰ and more surprises** вҖ” Explore every option; you might find something
  unexpected. рҹ‘Җ

---

## рҹҢҚ Browser

The in-built **DvorakBrowser** lets you "visit" the following sites:

| Site | Description |
|------|-------------|
| рҹҢҪ **Cornhub** | A wholesome page dedicated entirely to corn. Delicious. |
| рҹ“– **Wikipedia** | The free encyclopedia, DOS edition. |
| рҹӣ’ **eBay** | Browse the world's online marketplace. |
| рҹҡҖ **Vesmirni-lide.cz** | Czech site about space people вҖ” fascinating stuff! |
